"use client" import { useState, useRef } from "react" import { UserPlus2Icon, CheckCircleIcon, Link2Icon } from "lucide-react" import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button" import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, DialogTrigger } from "@/components/ui/dialog" import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input" import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label" import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select" import { Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipProvider, TooltipTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tooltip" export default function TeamInviteDialog() { const [members, setMembers] = useState([{ email: "", role: "Member" }]) const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false) const linkRef = useRef(null) const addMember = () => setMembers([...members, { email: "", role: "Member" }]) const updateMember = (index: number, key: "email" | "role", value: string) => { const updated = [...members] updated[index][key] = value setMembers(updated) } const copyInviteLink = () => { if (linkRef.current) { navigator.clipboard.writeText(linkRef.current.value) setCopied(true) setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 1500) } } return ( Invite Your Team Quickly add team members and assign their roles. {/* Member Input Cards */}
{members.map((member, idx) => (
updateMember(idx, "email", e.target.value)} className="flex-1" />
))}
{/* Send Invites */}
{/* Magic Link */}
Copy invite link
) }

_meta.author: ruixen.ui
_meta.title: TeamInviteDialog
_meta.description: This component is a modern Team Invite Dialog that allows users to quickly invite multiple team members via email or a magic link. Each member can be assigned a specific role (like Member, Admin, or Viewer) using a clean, card-style input layout. The interface is compact, responsive, and visually engaging, with interactive features such as dynamic addition of email fields, tooltips, and visual feedback when the invite link is copied. It provides an efficient and user-friendly way to manage team invitations within a web application.
